field.label: Hide the Cookie Bar if No Decision Was Taken
field.tooltip: According to the GDPR requirements, the cookie bar should be displayed in case the customer did not interact with it. Set 'Yes' if you don't want the Cookie Bar to be displayed to customers on new pages unless they accept or decline cookies on the bar.

field.label: Country Restrictions
field.tooltip: It is possible to adjust the visibility of Cookie Policy Bar on frontend according to customer location. Enable the Cookie Policy Bar for All Countries, EEA Countries or specific Countries selected in the list below..

field.label: Log Guest Cookie Consent
field.tooltip: If enabled, guest users who give the consent will be logged and displayed in Consent Log.

field.label: Cookie Log Auto-Cleaning Period (Days)
field.tooltip: All records that been stored for the longer period will be automatically removed from the Cookie Consent Log and your database.

field.label: Notification Text
field.comment: You can use any HTML-tags in this field. Please, mind the security.

field.label: Background Color
field.comment: Click the field to choose color

field.label: Policy Text Color
field.comment: Click the field to choose color

field.label: Enable
field.comment: Enable Google consent mode to send data to GA4 using conversion modeling and behavior modeling if the user declined cookies.

field.label: Enable
field.comment: Enable UET Tag сonsent mode to adjust Microsoft tag behavior based on the user's default consent state before cookies are accepted or declined.

field.label: Enable
field.comment: Enable Clarity consent mode to send the consent state to Clarity based on the user preferences, as well as send the default state before user accepts/declines the cookies.
